name: Magician's Restage
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>術</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>師</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>再</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>演</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can target 1 Level 3 or lower Spellcaster monster in your GY; Special Summon it. This effect can only be used once while this card is face-up on the field. If this card is sent to the GY: You can add 1 "Magician" Continuous Spell from your Deck to your hand, except "Magician's Restage".
eff: You can target 1 Level 3 or lower Spellcaster monster in your GY; Special Summon it. This effect can only be used once while this card is face-up on the field. If this card is sent to the GY: You can add 1 "Magician" Continuous Spell from your Deck to your hand, except "Magician's Restage".

misc: Once while face-up on the field
